name: closing_statement_date_present
expression: closing_statement_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(closing_statement_date)) > 0
description: closing_statement_date is required for Closing Statement extraction.

name: property_address_present
expression: property_address IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(property_address)) > 0
description: property_address is required for Closing Statement extraction.

name: buyer_name_present
expression: buyer_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(buyer_name)) > 0
description: buyer_name is required for Closing Statement extraction.

name: seller_name_present
expression: seller_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(seller_name)) > 0
description: seller_name is required for Closing Statement extraction.

name: closing_date_present
expression: closing_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(closing_date)) > 0
description: closing_date is required for Closing Statement extraction.

name: purchase_price_present
expression: purchase_price IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(purchase_price)) > 0
description: purchase_price is required for Closing Statement extraction.

name: purchase_price_non_negative
description: purchase_price should be non-negative when present.

name: loan_amount_non_negative
description: loan_amount should be non-negative when present.

name: buyer_cash_to_close_non_negative
description: buyer_cash_to_close should be non-negative when present.

name: seller_proceeds_non_negative
description: seller_proceeds should be non-negative when present.
